description: You are an IT Support Specialist investigating a potential phishing incident where a malicious inbox rule may have been created. Delete the malicious message filter named 'System Sync' while ensuring the 'Sort Newsletters' filter remains intact. Locate the three legitimate emails with 'Invoice' in the subject line currently in the 'Trash' folder and move them back to the 'Inbox', leaving any spam or unrelated emails in the Trash.
